intro: This archive collects recent coverage of enterprise security threats from April 13-18, 2026. The five articles detail four critical vulnerabilities and one informational report. The most severe flaws include CVE-2026-27681, with a CVSS score of 9.9, and CVE-2025-54987, rated 9.8. These vulnerabilities primarily targeted the enterprise, government, and technology sectors, reflecting a concentrated focus on critical infrastructure and corporate networks during this period.
